headline: NRG Energy Annual Meeting: Shareholder Special-Meeting Proposal Passes as CEO Larry Coben Steps Down
summary: NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on Thursday morning, outlining five proposals put to a vote and addressing shareholder questions ranging from customer reviews in Illinois to balance sheet concerns tied to acquisitions and natural gas exposure.
